				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-594c205a hs_content elementor-widget elementor-widget-theme-post-content" data-id="594c205a" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="theme-post-content.default">

					<p class="post-modified-info">Last Updated on September 1, 2025 by <a href="" target="_blank" class="last-modified-author"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="b5ddd0d9d9daf5ddc6ddc6ddd4c7d0dddac0c6d09bd6dad8">[email protected]</span></a></p>
<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>In this article, we will guide international students through the vibrant life at National Taiwan University (NTU) and its surrounding area in Taipei. As one of Taiwan’s top universities, NTU is renowned not only for its excellent academic resources but also for its rich campus culture and charming environment, which attract international students from around the world. Whether you have just arrived in Taipei or are already adjusting to the city, our introduction will help you better integrate into NTU’s life and discover must-try foods and attractions in the city. </p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>Additionally, we will provide a detailed overview of NTU’s Chinese Language Division (CLD), a premier place for international students to learn Mandarin. To ensure a smooth transition, we will also recommend comfortable rental options for student housing, including apartment choices that offer both convenience and safety. By securing a suitable rental, you can enjoy your time studying at NTU with peace of mind. We hope this article will help you gain a deeper understanding of NTU and make your study abroad experience both fulfilling and memorable.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><span class="ez-toc-section" id="Introduction_to_National_Taiwan_University_NTU"></span>Introduction to National Taiwan University (NTU)<span class="ez-toc-section-end"></span></h2>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>National Taiwan University (NTU) is one of Taiwan’s most prestigious higher education institutions, located in the vibrant center of Taipei. The NTU campus is expansive, featuring many historic buildings and beautiful natural landscapes, providing an ideal environment for both learning and living.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>One of the iconic spots on campus is the Coconut Palm Avenue, a straight tree-lined path flanked by towering coconut trees, popular among students and faculty for walking and photography. Located in the northeastern corner of the campus, Zuiyue Lake offers a picturesque setting for students to relax and reflect after classes. The modern Fu Bell Tower by the lake often chimes throughout the campus, becoming a symbol of NTU.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>The NTU campus also boasts numerous important academic and cultural facilities. The Main Library serves as a crucial resource center for academic research, with an extensive collection of books and a quiet environment for study and research. Additionally, the National Taiwan University Arts and Culture Center frequently hosts various art exhibitions and cultural events, enriching the campus life for international students.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><a href="https://www.ntu.edu.tw/"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="1024" height="768" src="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145103_0_a78c56.png" alt="" class="wp-image-20737" srcset="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145103_0_a78c56.png 1024w, https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145103_0_a78c56-768x576.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" /></a></figure>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><span class="ez-toc-section" id="Introduction_to_the_Chinese_Language_Division_at_NTU"></span>Introduction to the Chinese Language Division at NTU<span class="ez-toc-section-end"></span></h2>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><span class="ez-toc-section" id="Chinese_Language_Division_CLD"></span>Chinese Language Division (CLD)<span class="ez-toc-section-end"></span></h3>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>Established in 1962, the Chinese Language Division (CLD) at National Taiwan University (NTU) is one of the oldest Chinese language teaching institutions in Taiwan. As a premier destination for international students to learn Mandarin, the NTU Chinese Language Division is renowned for its high-quality teaching and extensive cultural activities.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>The CLD offers a diverse range of courses to meet the needs of international students at different language levels and learning objectives. Whether you are a beginner or an advanced learner, there are both short-term summer programs and long-term semester courses available. With small class sizes, the division ensures personalized instruction to help international students achieve optimal learning outcomes.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>In addition to classroom teaching, the CLD places significant emphasis on cultural exchange and practical activities. The center frequently organizes various cultural events such as calligraphy, tea ceremonies, and traditional festival celebrations, helping international students gain a deeper understanding of Taiwanese culture and apply their language skills in real-life situations.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><a href="https://cld.lang.ntu.edu.tw/index.html"><img decoding="async" width="1024" height="768" src="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145127_0_5f38c4.png" alt="" class="wp-image-20738" srcset="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145127_0_5f38c4.png 1024w, https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145127_0_5f38c4-768x576.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" /></a></figure>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading"><span class="ez-toc-section" id="Mandarin_Learning_Classes"></span>Mandarin Learning Classes<span class="ez-toc-section-end"></span></h4>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>These classes aim to enhance the Chinese language abilities of international students at all levels. Typically, the classes are divided into beginner, intermediate, and advanced levels, with each course designed to address students’ specific needs and language proficiency. The courses cover the four main areas of listening, speaking, reading, and writing, with a focus on practical application through interactive teaching and hands-on activities. In addition to language learning, international students can participate in cultural activities such as calligraphy and Taiwan history lectures, enriching their understanding of Mandarin and Taiwanese culture.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><img decoding="async" width="1024" height="768" src="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829161022_0_738661.png" alt="" class="wp-image-20800" srcset="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829161022_0_738661.png 1024w, https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829161022_0_738661-768x576.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" /></figure>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading"><span class="ez-toc-section" id="Online_Mandarin_Courses"></span>Online Mandarin Courses<span class="ez-toc-section-end"></span></h4>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>These courses are designed for international students who cannot attend NTU’s campus in person. They offer flexible learning options, allowing students to study from home or any location with internet access. The online courses cover similar content to the in-person courses, including language fundamentals, grammar, and conversation practice, and are supported by professional online teaching platforms and interactive tools to ensure a high-quality learning experience. This format is particularly suitable for  international students with flexible schedules or those who need to study Mandarin during specific periods.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading"><span class="ez-toc-section" id="Customized_Mandarin_Courses"></span>Customized Mandarin Courses<span class="ez-toc-section-end"></span></h4>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>These courses are tailored for international students with specific learning needs. Whether focusing on business Chinese, academic Mandarin, or improving particular language skills such as pronunciation or listening, the Chinese Language Division provides customized courses based on individual requirements. Taught by experienced instructors, these courses are offered in one-on-one or small group formats to ensure personalized attention and guidance. Customized courses not only effectively enhance international students’ language abilities but also help them achieve specific learning goals or address particular language challenges.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="768" src="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829161120_0_f76524.png" alt="" class="wp-image-20801" srcset="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829161120_0_f76524.png 1024w, https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829161120_0_f76524-768x576.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" /></figure>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><span class="ez-toc-section" id="International_Chinese_Language_Program_ICLP"></span>International Chinese Language Program (ICLP)<span class="ez-toc-section-end"></span></h3>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>Established in 1963, the International Chinese Language Program (ICLP) at National Taiwan University (NTU) originated from the Inter-University Program for Chinese Language Studies (IUP). ICLP is designed for scholars, graduate students, and advanced language learners who aim to achieve a professional level of proficiency in Mandarin. It is one of the top institutions worldwide for learning Chinese.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>ICLP is known for its rigorous teaching style and intensive course schedule. Students attend classes for four to five hours each day and participate in small group instruction or one-on-one tutoring, allowing them to rapidly improve their Mandarin skills in a short period. The courses cover a broad range of topics, including modern Chinese, classical Chinese, and Taiwanese social and cultural studies, with flexible adjustments based on individual learning needs.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>In addition to classroom instruction, ICLP emphasizes practical application and cultural immersion. Students have opportunities to engage in various cultural activities and language practice, deepening their understanding of Taiwan and the Mandarin-speaking world. These activities include exploring traditional culture and modern societal aspects, helping international students integrate what they learn in the classroom into everyday life.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><a href="https://www.ntu.edu.tw/"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="768" src="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145140_0_e6ca3e.png" alt="" class="wp-image-20739" srcset="https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145140_0_e6ca3e.png 1024w, https://en.hshsharehouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/20240829145140_0_e6ca3e-768x576.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" /></a></figure>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading"><span class="ez-toc-section" id="Academic_Year_Program"></span>Academic Year Program<span class="ez-toc-section-end"></span></h4>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>



<p>This is a full-year program at ICLP, suitable for international students who wish to immerse themselves in Mandarin over an academic year. The program is structured into semesters, each lasting about 15 weeks, and includes courses from beginner to advanced levels. The curriculum features intensive language training, focusing on listening, speaking, reading, and writing, along with professional language instruction and practical opportunities. Students also participate in language exchange, cultural activities, and community service to enhance their language skills and understanding of Taiwanese culture.</p>



<p class="has-white-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-361a646e193ed7811c51d0a05e2735e2">–</p>
